changes: Searing Flash: Potency has been increased from 600 to 700.
Umbral Impulse: Potency has been increased from 620 to 640.
Umbral Flare: Potency has been increased from 280 to 300.
Sunflare: Potency has been increased from 800 to 1,000.

new_content.name: The Merchant's Tale
new_content.description: A new variant dungeon scheduled to release in Patch 7.45.

new_content.name: Inconceivably Further Hildibrand Adventures
new_content.description: New sidequests scheduled to release in Patch 7.45.

new_content.name: Oizys
new_content.description: The new destination for the Cosmic Exploration Initiative. Players can travel to the star using the Bestways Burrow aetheryte or by speaking with Cruisingway or Phaenna.
new_content.npc_location: Drivingway in Mare Lamentorum (X:21.9 Y:13.2), Cruisingway at Sinus Ardorum (X:20.6 Y:19.5), or Phaenna (X:27.0 Y:13.9)

new_content.name: Mission of Gravity
new_content.description: Cosmic Exploration sidequest for Disciples of the Hand or Land level 10. Requires completion of the quest 'The Brightest Star.'

new_content.name: Memory's Orbit
new_content.description: Cosmic Exploration sidequest for Disciples of the Hand or Land level 10. Requires completion of the quest 'Mission of Gravity' and a certain amount of project progress.

new_content.name: A Manager's Prudence
new_content.description: Cosmic Exploration sidequest for Disciples of the Hand or Land level 10. Requires completion of the quests 'Memory's Orbit' and 'A Manager's Delegation,' and a certain amount of project progress.

new_content.name: Terror along the Tracks
new_content.description: Cosmic Exploration sidequest for Disciples of the Hand or Land level 10. Requires completion of the quest 'Memory's Orbit' and a certain amount of project progress.

new_content.name: A Manager's Power
new_content.description: Cosmic Exploration sidequest for Disciples of the Hand or Land level 10. Requires completion of the quest 'Terror along the Tracks' and a certain amount of project progress.

new_content.name: An Interstellar Field Trip
new_content.description: Cosmic Exploration sidequest for Disciples of the Hand or Land level 10. Requires completion of the quests 'Memory's Orbit' and 'The Meeting of Minds,' and a certain amount of project progress.

new_content.name: Timeworn Techniques
new_content.description: Phantom Weapon sidequest for Disciples of War or Magic level 100. Requires completion of the quest 'Wrought by Hands Phantasmal.'
new_content.npc_location: Lydirceil at The Phantom Village (X:6.6 Y:7.1)

new_content.name: In Pursuit of Perfection
new_content.description: Phantom Weapon sidequest for Disciples of War or Magic level 100. Requires completion of the quest 'Timeworn Techniques.'
new_content.npc_location: Lydirceil at The Phantom Village (X:6.6 Y:7.1)

new_content.name: A Phantom Reborn
new_content.description: Phantom Weapon sidequest for Disciples of War or Magic level 100. Requires completion of the quest 'In Pursuit of Perfection.'
new_content.npc_location: Lydirceil at The Phantom Village (X:6.6 Y:7.1)

new_content.name: Phantom Weapon Enhancement
new_content.description: A system allowing players to enhance the strength of their phantom weapons. After completing 'A Phantom Reborn', additional phantom weapons can be enhanced by exchanging Waning Arcanite with Dodokkuli.
new_content.npc_location: Dodokkuli at The Phantom Village (X:6.7 Y:7.1)

new_content.name: Artifact Search
new_content.description: A feature where players collect dronebits from class A and provisional missions, exchange them for drone modules to launch reconnaissance drones, and analyze the area on Oizys to find ancient records.

new_content.name: Cosmic Tools Enhancement
new_content.description: A feature allowing players to further enhance class-specific tools for Disciples of the Hand and Land by completing stellar missions and reporting research data.
new_content.npc_location: Researchingway on the star where the player currently resides

new_content.name: Oizys Credits
new_content.description: A new currency system earned by participating in stellar missions and projects on Oizys, exchangeable for mech op pilot applications or cosmic fortunes.

new_content.name: Oizys Exploration Tokens
new_content.description: Tokens awarded for completing EX+ stellar missions on Oizys, exchangeable for a special mount.

new_content.name: Starward Standings
new_content.description: A contribution tallying and ranking system based on player contributions from stellar missions, mech ops, and projects on Oizys.

new_content.name: AAC Cruiserweight Tier (Savage) Echo System
new_content.description: A system update that grants the power of the Echo upon commencing the duty, increasing players' maximum HP, damage dealt, and healing potency by 10%.

new_content.name: AAC Heavyweight M1 / AAC Heavyweight M1 (Savage)
new_content.description: Raid instances mentioned in updates and resolved issues regarding visual adjustments to ally actions and incorrect boss attack indicators.

new_content.name: Hell on Rails / Hell on Rails (Extreme)
new_content.description: Duty mentioned in resolved issues regarding boss action Runaway Train.

new_content.name: AAC Heavyweight M2 (Savage)
new_content.description: Raid instance mentioned in resolved issues regarding boss action Flame Floater.

new_content.name: AAC Heavyweight M3 (Savage)
new_content.description: Raid instance mentioned in resolved issues regarding boss action Majestic Meteor.

new_content.name: AAC Heavyweight M4 (Savage)
new_content.description: Raid instance mentioned in resolved issues regarding platform splitting from boss action Lindwurm's Meteor.

housing.name: Cosmomodule Inner Wall
housing.description: An interior wall used in habitation modules constructed by the Cosmic Exploration Initiative.

housing.name: Cosmomodule Flooring
housing.description: Floorboards used in habitation modules constructed by the Cosmic Exploration Initiative.

housing.name: Cosmic Safety Lamp
housing.description: Developed by the Cosmic Exploration Initiative, this lamp remains functional in even the most unstable of environs.

housing.name: Cosmic Antenna
housing.description: Developed by the Cosmic Exploration Initiative, this antenna emits a strong and stable signal without interruption.

housing.name: Shady Cosmoshelter
housing.description: Developed by the Cosmic Exploration Initiative, this roofed structure protects against falling objects as well as harmful rays of light.

housing.name: Cosmic Storage Bench
housing.description: This futuristic bench features a concealed storage space for stowing all manner of cosmic clutter.

housing.name: Imitation Cosmoportal
housing.description: An imitation window to the imitation stars.

housing.name: Cosmomodule Floor Panel
housing.description: Pave the way to the future─or the floor of your own personal habitation module─with these sleek panels.
